texto: It was impossible to understand how brief it is. It seemed like youth would last so long
autor: it would last forever. But it's just a blink.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it would last forever. But it's just a blink.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “It was impossible to understand how brief it is. It seemed like youth would last so long” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, chris-pavone, the-expats pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-expats.
